found_stable.quote: Notwithstanding Section 4, service improvement data may include prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, and logs and may be used to evaluate, benchmark, and improve models and services.

Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts means only configuration files and evaluation summaries created specifically for Customer, excluding fine-tuned weights, adapters, embeddings, and platform-level deliverables.

Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts means only configuration files and evaluation summaries created specifically for Customer, excluding fine-tuned weights, adapters, embeddings, and platform-level deliverables.
Vendor may process and store Customer Data in any region used by Vendor or its subprocessors.

Vendor may update any use, content, safety, moderation, customer-eligibility, or product-operation policy at any time, and each update is binding immediately upon posting whether or not required by law or security need.
Upon expiration or termination, Vendor may provide transition assistance only if the parties agree to a separate professional-services order.
